urdu transliteration text:
Ro rahi hain sochhkar, ro rahi hain sochhkar, Ummul Baneen ye aaj bhi,Asghar e Besheer jaisi qabr ha Abbas ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Ummul Baneen cries to this day, with this thought in mind, The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
Rashk karti thi me Aqs e Haider e Qarrar par,Paun khat dete the uske baith kar rahwar par,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I used to beam with pride, at him, the likeness of Haider, As he rode on his horse, his feet would touch the ground

urdu transliteration text:
Haye mere sher ki , ye kaisi haalat hogayi, Asghar e Besheer jaisi qabr ha Abbas ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Woe to the condition of my lion, how did this happen? The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
Baap ke badle musalmaano ne bete se liye,sar juda hai tan juda bazu juda hai sher ke,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The ‘Muslims’ exacted revenge on the son, for their hatred of the father, My lion lies with his head and arms severed

urdu transliteration text:
Aapki tasweer tukde tukde, hogayi hai Ya AliAsghar e Besheer jaisi qabr ha Abbas ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Ali, your likeness is now torn to piecesThe grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
Shaamiyo ne laash ko paamal ye kehkar kiya,Kya isi Abbas par Binte Ali ko naaz tha,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The people of Shaam trampled his body while crying out, Is this the Abbas that the daughter of Ali was so proud of?

urdu transliteration text:
Saaniye Zehra samaa ye, dekh kar roti huwiAsghar e Besheer jaisi qabr ha Abbas ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Zainab continued to cry at this sight The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
Kab samata tha meri chadar me tu aaye mere laal,Kar diya hai zaalimon ne te tere laashe ka haal,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When was it possible for you to be draped in my shawl? Look what these oppressors have done to you, oh my son

urdu transliteration text:
Hai mere sar ki rida bhi, teri turbat se badi,Asghar e Besheer jaisi qabr ha Abbas ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: My head covering alone is longer than your grave. The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar
